notes: Official EDAM URI page identifies EDAM.owl and EDAM.obo as machine-understandable stable downloads. EDAM.owl serves a rolling development build with no immutable per-version URL, so the recorded sha256 is the integrity pin.
OBO Foundry and BioPortal list SBO as an OWL ontology with this version and license.
OBO Foundry lists SO OWL and OBO products and license. The PURL resolves to a mutable trunk, so the recorded sha256 is the integrity pin.
Gene Ontology recommends go-basic for annotation tools. Pinned to the dated release URL.
ChEBI OBO/OWL source used for future role/type compatibility slices. The PURL serves the latest release, so the recorded sha256 is the integrity pin.
Cell Ontology basic OBO subset used for Component.type cell-type classification in multicellular designs. Pinned to the dated release URL.
